title: Wacky Dimensions
description: Adds Strange Dimensions Anomalies And Armour
body:
Adds Strange And Wacky Dimensions.

READ DESCIPTION

Portals:

(All Built like nether portals)

Deepslate

Stripped Oak Log

Granite

Stone Brick

Error

To Make Igniters Combine Flint And Steel With The Portal Block In A Crafting Table Ex. One Flint And Steel + One Deepslate = Deepslate Portal Igniter

Anomolies are rare blocks found underground throughout your world.Mine one and get an Unstable Anomoly Shard.Stabilize This With The New Villager Profession And An Anomoly Stabilizer.After obtaining the Stabilized Anomolies You Can Craft Armour With It. When Wearing Any Piece Of The Armour Press F To Become Invisable For 5 Seconds.

Also Available On [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wacky-dimensions)

Please Leave Bugs And Feedback In The Comments Sections

 

Thats All Enjoy :)
